_note: Deployment provisioningState=Failed; az deployment group show --query properties.outputs returned null. This is intentional Azure Resource Manager behavior: outputs are not populated when the deployment did not reach Succeeded state. Resource shells (Container App, ACR, Log Analytics workspace) WERE created and are queryable via az containerapp list / az acr list / az monitor log-analytics workspace list against the dedicated resource group rg-aca-lab-acr. See README.md Quick Start step 3 for the canonical name-derivation pattern that works regardless of deployment outcome.
